description: Account of a partnership. Dated: Sivan 1529 Seleucid = May/June 1219 CE. Fragment of a leaf on which the accounting for the apartment of Ibrāhīm Ibn al-Shāʿir is presereved. The apartment is in the compound named after Menashshe (b. Yosef, the judge). Ibrahim b. al-Dayyan, mentioned in our documents of this period, is perhaps the son of the judge who lives in the apartment, half of which belongs to the qodesh. The compound is elsewhere described as sharikat al-Dayyan R. Menashshe. (Information from Gil, Documents, pp. 422 #125)
description_he: חשבון שותפות, סיון 1529 לשטרות (מאי-יוני 1219). שבר על דירת אבראהים אבן אל-שאעיר במתחם הנקרא על שם הדיין מנשה בן יוסף.
